data.title: CUPE: Airline industry appears to be flying the plane on federal government’s unpaid work probe
data.description: In Ottawa, the union representing 20,000 flight attendants in Canada, CUPE’s Airline Division, is questioning the fairness of the federal government's investigation into unpaid work in the airline industry, now in its second phase. Wesley Lesosky, President of CUPE's Airline Division, expressed concerns that the investigation seems biased in favor of the industry. The government's handling of the probe has raised doubts about its neutrality.

data.title: Leaf & Mineral™ Arrives on Harvest Natural Foods Shelves
data.description: Leaf & Mineral™, the clean cleaning brand, continues to expand its presence in the US with its third West Coast placement in just two months. The company, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, has experienced rapid growth since its entry into the market. The brand has garnered attention for its unique approach to health and wellness. With this latest placement, Leaf & Mineral™ solidifies its position as a key player in the industry, showcasing its commitment to serving customers across the country.

data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.7%. The report also shows that the economy added 250,000 jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations. This marks the longest continuous jobs growth streak in US history, with 94 straight months of job gains. Additionally, the report highlights that average hourly earnings have increased by 3.1% from last year, the largest jump in nearly a decade. Overall, these numbers suggest a strong and thriving labor market in the country.

data.title: ACE Cash Express Raises $74,192 for Humane World for Animals
data.description: In a press release issued on April 1, 2026, it was announced that Humane World for Animals (HWFA) has been recognized as a key charity partner of ACE Cash Express (ACE), which is a brand under Populus Financial Group, Inc. (Populus). As part of ACE's Chip In For Charity initiative, the partnership with HWFA has been extended this year. This collaboration signifies an important step forward in ACE's commitment to supporting charitable causes, with HWFA playing a vital role in this initiative.

data.title: Menoveda Announces Retail Placement in Greens Nutrition
data.description: Menoveda LifeSciences, a rapidly expanding Ayurveda health brand rooted in science, has secured shelf space in California for the third time since its debut in the US in October. The Florida-based company announced this development on April 1, 2026. With a commitment to science, Menoveda has crafted a line of products backed by clinical validation over several years of research. This marks a significant milestone for the brand as it continues to gain traction in the health and wellness market.

data.title: GENESIS BRINGS PRESTIGE GRAPHITE TRIM TO GV70 SUV
data.description: Genesis has unveiled the 2027 GV70 Prestige Graphite trim, featuring dark-tone elements, carbon fiber components, and exclusive colors. The new model will be showcased at the upcoming New York International Auto Show from April 3 to 12, 2026. Genesis made this announcement in New York on April 1, 2026.

data.title: Medi-Cal Enrollees Prepare for New Community Engagement Requirements; Health Net Launches "Get Informed, Stay Covered" to Educate Members
data.description: Health Net, an established Medi-Cal managed care health plan in California, has pledged $1 million towards a public information campaign. The initiative aims to assist eligible residents in retaining their Medi-Cal coverage following the implementation of new federal and state regulations. The funding commitment was announced on April 1, 2026, in Sacramento. This effort is crucial to support individuals as they navigate changes impacting their healthcare benefits.

data.title: FIELD OF STUDY BY PACSUN EXPANDS WITH FOREVER, CALIFORNIA COLLECTION
data.description: A new collection rooted in nostalgia and craftsmanship has been launched by Pacsun's premium in-house label, Field of Study. The brand's elevated men's line combines luxury with effortless wearability. The latest collection, named Forever, was introduced in Los Angeles on April 1, 2026. This new line aims to evoke nostalgia while showcasing quality craftsmanship.
